method: Evidence-constrained archetype seeding; these are research hypotheses, not demographic market segments.

primary_personas.title: Routine resident
primary_personas.goal: find current guidance and complete an everyday government task
primary_personas.context: A person knows the outcome they need but not the government vocabulary or owning body.

primary_personas.title: Person navigating a multi-service life event
primary_personas.goal: coordinate related steps across several public bodies
primary_personas.context: A life event crosses organisational boundaries and the correct order is not obvious.

primary_personas.title: Benefits and support claimant
primary_personas.goal: understand support, applicability and the next official step
primary_personas.context: Eligibility depends on personal facts and current rules, so unsupported certainty could cause harm.

primary_personas.title: Tax and pensions user
primary_personas.goal: find authoritative obligations, deadlines and records
primary_personas.context: The person needs time-sensitive information and may be comparing current and historical rules.

primary_personas.title: Parent or carer
primary_personas.goal: find and sequence services for a child or dependent person
primary_personas.context: The user acts for another person and may need local, national and delegated routes.

primary_personas.title: Bereaved person
primary_personas.goal: complete sensitive tasks in a safe and manageable order
primary_personas.context: The user is under emotional and cognitive load while information spans several organisations.

primary_personas.title: Worker or jobseeker
primary_personas.goal: understand rights, support and employment-related procedures
primary_personas.context: The person may use informal terms and needs clear applicability boundaries.

primary_personas.title: Driver or traveller
primary_personas.goal: find current requirements, warnings and transactional routes
primary_personas.context: The user needs date-sensitive guidance before travel or driving and may be overseas.

primary_personas.title: Learner or education user
primary_personas.goal: locate education guidance, funding and application routes
primary_personas.context: The correct route depends on age, place, provider and stage of learning.

primary_personas.title: Housing and local services user
primary_personas.goal: distinguish national guidance from the responsible local service
primary_personas.context: The user starts on GOV.UK but the actionable endpoint may be a local authority.

primary_personas.title: Health, safety or environment user
primary_personas.goal: find authoritative protective guidance without mistaking it for personal advice
primary_personas.context: The topic can be urgent or safety critical and may require a specialist service hand-off.

primary_personas.title: Justice and rights user
primary_personas.goal: understand rights, evidence and formal procedures
primary_personas.context: Legal effect, deadlines and jurisdiction must be preserved and the bundle must not invent advice.

primary_personas.title: Immigration or citizenship user
primary_personas.goal: locate current official requirements and application routes
primary_personas.context: Status and personal facts materially change applicability; errors can have serious consequences.

primary_personas.title: UK national living abroad
primary_personas.goal: find UK guidance and overseas service routes
primary_personas.context: The person must distinguish host-country responsibility from UK government support.

primary_personas.title: Overseas visitor to the UK
primary_personas.goal: understand entry, travel and service requirements
primary_personas.context: The user may not know UK administrative terms and may be using translation support.

primary_personas.title: Person with an urgent high-stakes need
primary_personas.goal: reach the authoritative emergency or specialist route quickly
primary_personas.context: Delay or false reassurance could cause harm, so abstention and escalation boundaries matter.

primary_personas.title: Person appealing or seeking historical evidence
primary_personas.goal: find the source state and procedure that applied at the relevant date
primary_personas.context: Current guidance may not answer a historical question and withdrawn records must remain visible.

primary_personas.title: Follower of government activity and news
primary_personas.goal: find attributable announcements, speeches and organisational context
primary_personas.context: The user needs to separate official publication, current policy and historical announcement context.

primary_personas.title: Founder or sole trader
primary_personas.goal: start and operate a business using the correct official routes
primary_personas.context: The user must connect registration, tax, licensing and local obligations.

primary_personas.title: Small or medium employer
primary_personas.goal: understand employer obligations and complete recurring processes
primary_personas.context: Requirements change with workforce, location and dates, and several departments may publish evidence.

primary_personas.title: Large or regulated organisation
primary_personas.goal: trace authoritative regulation, guidance and reporting obligations
primary_personas.context: The organisation needs auditable provenance and must distinguish guidance from binding requirements.

primary_personas.title: Importer or exporter
primary_personas.goal: find current cross-border rules, data and transactional hand-offs
primary_personas.context: Commodity, destination, origin and effective date can change the applicable route.

primary_personas.title: Charity or community body
primary_personas.goal: find governance, funding and public-service information
primary_personas.context: A mixed professional and volunteer team needs accessible, reusable evidence.

primary_personas.title: Public-sector supplier or grant applicant
primary_personas.goal: find opportunities, criteria, deadlines and submission routes
primary_personas.context: The organisation must compare current notices and preserve evidence used for a decision.

primary_personas.title: Professional adviser supporting a business
primary_personas.goal: assemble source-backed guidance for a client without replacing professional judgement
primary_personas.context: The adviser acts for another party and requires current, citable sources and clear limitations.

primary_personas.title: Developer or commercial content reuser
primary_personas.goal: discover machine-readable records and lawful reuse conditions
primary_personas.context: The user needs stable identifiers, update semantics, attachments, APIs and attribution requirements.

primary_personas.title: Frontline adviser
primary_personas.goal: find and explain official information during a supported interaction
primary_personas.context: The adviser must work quickly, preserve uncertainty and hand off to the authoritative service.

primary_personas.title: Local government or NHS officer
primary_personas.goal: connect national guidance to the correct local or specialist service
primary_personas.context: Responsibility and geography must be explicit where GOV.UK delegates delivery.

primary_personas.title: Policy official
primary_personas.goal: trace current policy publications, ownership and related evidence
primary_personas.context: The official needs organisational, topical and lifecycle context without treating metadata as policy text.

primary_personas.title: Government caseworker
primary_personas.goal: locate applicable guidance and record a source-backed hand-off
primary_personas.context: Personal decisions require facts outside the bundle, so the system must not decide the case.

primary_personas.title: Government content publisher
primary_personas.goal: understand record types, relationships and publishing consequences
primary_personas.context: The publisher needs schema-aware evidence and must preserve canonical and replacement relationships.

primary_personas.title: Service designer or user researcher
primary_personas.goal: test whether content structures support evidenced user needs
primary_personas.context: The researcher needs explicit hypotheses, gaps and evaluation status rather than invented findings.

primary_personas.title: Accessibility specialist
primary_personas.goal: inspect routes and representations for accessibility risks and alternatives
primary_personas.context: The specialist needs evidence about language, attachments, structure and low-bandwidth access.

primary_personas.title: Analyst or statistician
primary_personas.goal: find official datasets, statistics and publication context
primary_personas.context: The analyst needs machine-readable resources, provenance, release dates and revision status.

primary_personas.title: Legal or parliamentary researcher
primary_personas.goal: trace attributable records and their date-specific context
primary_personas.context: The researcher must distinguish guidance, policy, legislation and historical states.

primary_personas.title: Journalist, librarian, archivist or auditor
primary_personas.goal: verify provenance, chronology and organisational attribution
primary_personas.context: The user needs reproducible discovery, lifecycle evidence and transparent gaps.

primary_personas.title: Navigation and known-item agent
primary_personas.goal: rank canonical GOV.UK records for a user need
primary_personas.context: The agent must return stable identifiers and typed evidence without claiming to answer from metadata alone.

primary_personas.title: Grounded question-answering and citation agent
primary_personas.goal: discover sources then hand off for authoritative retrieval and citation
primary_personas.context: The agent must separate discovery from answer generation and expose unsupported questions.

primary_personas.title: Life-event planning agent
primary_personas.goal: assemble an ordered multi-service route with explicit boundaries
primary_personas.context: The agent traverses related content but must not infer personal eligibility or guarantee outcomes.

primary_personas.title: Eligibility and obligation explainer agent
primary_personas.goal: locate rules and request the facts needed for applicability
primary_personas.context: The agent may explain source boundaries but must abstain from unsupported personal determinations.

primary_personas.title: Transaction hand-off agent
primary_personas.goal: route a user from discovery to the correct official transaction
primary_personas.context: The agent preserves canonical links, prerequisites and jurisdiction while avoiding simulated completion.

primary_personas.title: Business compliance support agent
primary_personas.goal: assemble applicable official obligations and evidence for review
primary_personas.context: The agent must preserve effective dates and distinguish source discovery from legal or professional advice.

primary_personas.title: Policy and legal research agent
primary_personas.goal: trace attributable current and historical government records
primary_personas.context: The agent exposes conflicts, lifecycle changes and gaps and never treats metadata as legal text.

primary_personas.title: Content reuse and adaptation agent
primary_personas.goal: find reusable records and preserve attribution and source links
primary_personas.context: The agent applies licensing and fair-use triggers and flags third-party material for review.

primary_personas.title: Content change and withdrawal monitor
primary_personas.goal: detect lifecycle, redirect and replacement changes reproducibly
primary_personas.context: The agent compares frozen snapshots and preserves missing, withdrawn and superseded states.

primary_personas.title: Crawler and indexer agent
primary_personas.goal: enumerate metadata records within documented source constraints
primary_personas.context: The agent obeys rate, robots, licensing and completeness limits and reports denied access.

primary_personas.title: Data, API and attachment discovery agent
primary_personas.goal: locate machine-readable resources and describe their provenance
primary_personas.context: The agent identifies representations and attachments without inventing their content or availability.

primary_personas.title: Provenance, audit and adaptation agent
primary_personas.goal: produce a reproducible evidence trail for discovered records
primary_personas.context: The agent records source identity, snapshot, transformations, checksums, licensing and unresolved conflicts.
